texto: How many ghosts might return to the promenade, haunted by the echoes of those promises, perhaps eager to catch a glimpse of what could have been? Would they laugh at the survivors shuffling about in this briny detritus? Or would they cry?"Reid, A. J. (2012-11-08). A Smaller Hell (Kindle Locations 885-886). . Kindle Edition.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de A.J. Reid que provoca temas ligados a humor. Ao questionar “How many ghosts might return to the promenade, haunted by the echoes of those promises, perhaps e…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre humor, ghosts, memories, com foco em memories e promenade.
